name: Video to Transcript to PDF Email Pipeline Conditional

parameters.subject: Meeting Context
parameters.message:
Hi,

Please find the session summary attached as a PDF.

Thanks

parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: "gpt-5.4",
  input: [
    {
      role: "system",
      content: "You convert meeting transcripts into clean professional documentation."
    },
    {
      role: "user",
      content: `Convert the transcript into structured session documentation.

Rules:

• If transcript is not English, translate it to English first  
• Remove conversational language like "the speaker said"  
• Do NOT invent information  
• Keep all important technical details  
• Write like a **knowledge document**, not a conversation summary  

Writing style:

• Use **clear professional English**  
• Sentences must be complete  
• Do NOT break sentences across lines  
• Write proper paragraphs  
• Avoid random line breaks  

Bullet rules:

• Use "- " for bullet points  
• Each bullet must be a complete sentence  

Structure the output EXACTLY in this format:

TITLE
Write a short descriptive title.

OVERVIEW
Write one short paragraph explaining what the session covers.

KEY CONCEPTS
Explain the core ideas discussed.
Use sub-headings with **bold formatting** when needed.

DETAILED EXPLANATION
Explain the topic in logical order using paragraphs.
Do NOT split sentences across lines.
Do NOT insert bullet points unless necessary.

IMPORTANT POINTS
Write key takeaways as bullet points using "- ".

ACTION ITEMS
List tasks only if they were mentioned in the transcript.
Use bullet points.

CONCLUSION
Write a short closing summary.

Transcript:
${$json.output?.[0]?.content?.[0]?.text || $json.output_text || $json.cleaned_transcript}`
    }
  ],
  temperature: 0.2
}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: "gpt-5.4",
  input: [
    {
      role: "system",
      content: "You clean raw speech transcripts and convert them into readable paragraphs."
    },
    {
      role: "user",
      content:
`Clean the following transcript.

Rules:

• Remove repeated sentences  
• If not English, translate to English  
• Remove filler words (um, uh, hmm, you know, etc.)  
• Remove watermark lines like "Transcribed by https://otter.ai"  
• Fix grammar  
• Merge broken lines into proper sentences  
• Convert fragmented speech into clear paragraphs  
• Ensure sentences are complete and not split across lines  
• Do NOT summarize  
• Do NOT remove information  
• Keep the meaning identical  

Formatting rules:

• Write in full paragraphs  
• Do NOT insert random line breaks  
• Only break lines between paragraphs  

Transcript:
${$json.text}`
    }
  ],
  temperature: 0
}) }}
